data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the quiz/assessment option.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the quiz/assessment option to confirm that users have read the policy documents. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or API reads that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for a quiz/assessment option, but there are no concrete examples or evidence of this feature being implemented or tested, leading to an inconclusive validation.
gaps: No evidence confirming the existence or functionality of the quiz/assessment option.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the quiz/assessment option requirement.
